## NNN — Short descriptive title

**Date discovered:** YYYY-MM-DD  
**Severity:** Service-affecting / Functional / Cosmetic  
**Components:** affected components

**Symptoms:**
What you actually see when this hits.

**Root cause:**
Why it happens.

**Fix applied:**
What you did.

**Considered but deferred:**
Alternatives and why they weren't chosen.

**Lesson:**
The general principle to carry forward.
